title: Mock Test 28 - Active vs Passive Voice
description: এই টেস্টে Active vs Passive Voice নিয়ে ২০টি প্রশ্ন রয়েছে। প্রথম কয়েকটি প্রশ্নে জানবো নিয়ম ও গঠন, তারপর fill in the blanks, error detection ও অনুবাদ দিয়ে উদাহরণ সহ শেখা। প্রতিটি প্রশ্নের বাংলা অর্থ ও বিস্তারিত ব্যাখ্যা দেওয়া আছে।

questions.question: Active Voice-এ বাক্যের গঠন কী?
questions.explanation: Active Voice: Subject নিজে কাজ করে। Structure: Subject + Verb + Object। যেমন: I write a letter. (আমি চিঠি লিখি)। এখানে Subject (I) কাজটি করছে।

questions.question: Passive Voice-এ বাক্যের গঠন কী?
questions.explanation: Passive Voice: Object-এর উপর কাজটি happening হয়। Structure: Object + be + V3 + by + Subject। যেমন: A letter is written by me. (একটি চিঠি আমার দ্বারা লেখা হয়)।

questions.question: Active থেকে Passive করার সময় tense অনুযায়ী কী পরিবর্তন হয়?
options: 'Be' verb-এর রূপ tense অনুযায়ী পরিবর্তিত হয় + V3
questions.explanation: Passive-এ 'be' verb-এর রূপ main verb-এর tense অনুযায়ী হয়। Present Indefinite → am/is/are + V3। Past Indefinite → was/were + V3। Present Continuous → am/is/are + being + V3। Present Perfect → have/has + been + V3।

questions.question: Passive Voice-এ 'by' phrase না থাকলে কী বুঝায়?
options: Subject জানা নেই বা গুরুত্বপূর্ণ নয়
questions.explanation: 'By' phrase না থাকলে বোঝায় যে doer (কর্তা) unknown/অজানা, unimportant/গুরুত্বপূর্ণ নয়, বা obvious/স্পষ্ট। যেমন: The window was broken. (কে ভাঙলো জানি না/বলার প্রয়োজন নেই)।

questions.question: নিচের কোনটি Active Voice?
options: The book was written by him.
questions.explanation: 'She sings a song' = Active Voice (Subject + Verb + Object)। বাকিগুলো Passive Voice (object + be + V3)।

questions.question: The letter ___ by her yesterday. (চিঠিটি গতকাল তার দ্বারা লেখা হয়েছিল)
questions.explanation: Active: She wrote the letter yesterday. Passive: The letter was written by her yesterday. (Past Indefinite → was/were + V3)

questions.question: Rice ___ in Bangladesh. (বাংলাদেশে চাল উৎপাদিত হয়)
questions.explanation: Active: People grow rice in Bangladesh. Passive: Rice is grown in Bangladesh. (Present Indefinite Passive → is/are + V3)

questions.question: The work ___ by the students now. (কাজটি এখন ছাত্রদের দ্বারা করা হচ্ছে)
questions.explanation: Active: The students are doing the work now. Passive: The work is being done by the students now. (Present Continuous Passive → am/is/are + being + V3)

questions.question: The project ___ by next month. (প্রকল্পটি আগামী মাসের মধ্যে শেষ করা হবে)
questions.explanation: Active: They will finish the project by next month. Passive: The project will be finished by next month. (Future Passive → will be + V3)

questions.question: The homework ___ already. (হোমওয়ার্ক ইতিমধ্যে করা হয়েছে)
questions.explanation: Active: They have already done the homework. Passive: The homework has already been done. (Present Perfect Passive → have/has + been + V3)

questions.question: Error Detection: 'The book was wrote by Rahim.' — ভুল অংশ কোনটি?
questions.explanation: Passive-এ সবসময় V3 (past participle) ব্যবহার হয়। 'Wrote' = V2, 'Written' = V3। সঠিক: 'The book was written by Rahim.'

questions.question: Error Detection: 'English is speak all over the world.' — ভুল অংশ কোনটি?
questions.explanation: Passive-এ 'be + V3' হয়। 'Is speak' → 'is spoken' হবে। সঠিক: 'English is spoken all over the world.'

questions.question: Error Detection: 'The letter is being write now.' — ভুল অংশ কোনটি?
questions.explanation: Present Continuous Passive = am/is/are + being + V3। 'Write' → 'written' হবে। সঠিক: 'The letter is being written now.'

questions.question: Error Detection: 'The building was build in 1990.' — ভুল অংশ কোনটি?
questions.explanation: Passive = was/were + V3। 'Build' = V1, 'Built' = V3। সঠিক: 'The building was built in 1990.'

questions.question: Fill in the blank: 'Active: The cat ___ the mouse.' → 'Passive: The mouse was caught by the cat.'
questions.explanation: Active Past Indefinite (caught) → Passive: was/were + V3 (caught)। 'The cat caught the mouse.' → 'The mouse was caught by the cat.'

questions.question: Fill in the blank: 'Active: She ___ a letter.' → 'Passive: A letter is written by her.'
questions.explanation: Passive 'is written' = Present Indefinite Passive। Active Present Indefinite (writes)। 'She writes a letter.' → 'A letter is written by her.'

questions.question: Fill in the blank: 'Active: They ___ the bridge.' → 'Passive: The bridge is being built by them.'
questions.explanation: Passive 'is being built' = Present Continuous Passive। Active Present Continuous (are building)। 'They are building the bridge.' → 'The bridge is being built by them.'

questions.question: Fill in the blank: 'Active: Someone ___ my wallet.' → 'Passive: My wallet has been stolen.'
questions.explanation: Passive 'has been stolen' = Present Perfect Passive। Active Present Perfect (has stolen)। 'Someone has stolen my wallet.'

questions.question: বাংলা বাক্যটির সঠিক ইংরেজি অনুবাদ কোনটি? 'চিঠিটি আমার দ্বারা লেখা হয়েছিল।'
options: The letter was written by me.
The letter is written by me.
The letter was wrote by me.
questions.explanation: Passive Past Indefinite → was/were + V3। 'The letter was written by me.' (By me' = আমার দ্বারা)

questions.question: বাংলা বাক্যটির সঠিক ইংরেজি অনুবাদ কোনটি? 'ইংরেজি সারা বিশ্বে বলা হয়।'
options: English speaks all over the world.
English is speak all over the world.
English is spoken all over the world.
English was spoken all over the world.
questions.explanation: Present Indefinite Passive → is/are + V3। 'English is spoken all over the world.' (Spoken = V3 of speak)
